summary: PR 22 reorganized the MWCC compiler tool path by introducing a Makefile variable, MWCC_VERSION := 1.1, and changing CC/LD to resolve executables under tools/mwcc_compiler/$(MWCC_VERSION)/. The README build instructions were updated to tell contributors to place MWCC Build 158 / CodeWarrior 1.1 binaries in tools/mwcc_compiler/1.1/ and optionally extract GC_COMPILERS.zip to tools/mwcc_compiler/. This was a small infrastructure cleanup that made compiler-version directory layout explicit and easier to extend.
what_changed: Added MWCC_VERSION := 1.1 near the Makefile tool definitions.
Updated README build instructions so MWCC Build 158 PowerPC binaries are placed in tools/mwcc_compiler/1.1/ instead of directly in tools/mwcc_compiler/.
Added README guidance that users in the Gamecube/Wii Decompilation Discord could extract GC_COMPILERS.zip to tools/mwcc_compiler/.
smart_moves: Pulled the compiler version into a Makefile variable instead of hardcoding the versioned subdirectory into each executable path.
Kept Windows/Wine handling unchanged while only adjusting the MWCC executable location, minimizing unrelated build-system risk.
Updated documentation in the same PR as the Makefile path change, preventing setup instructions from drifting from the actual build behavior.
Used a versioned compiler directory layout, which can support multiple MWCC/CodeWarrior versions without replacing binaries in-place.
decomp_lessons: For decompilation projects, compiler identity is part of the matching environment; encode the compiler version explicitly in build paths rather than relying on an ambiguous tools directory.
When changing toolchain layout, update README build instructions immediately so new contributors reproduce the intended environment.
A small Makefile variable such as MWCC_VERSION gives future work a central place to switch compiler versions if different object files require different CodeWarrior/MWCC setups.
Toolchain setup changes can be valuable even when no source matching changes occur, because stable and reproducible compiler invocation is prerequisite for matching.
naming_conventions: Used uppercase Makefile variable naming for toolchain configuration: MWCC_VERSION.
Represented the CodeWarrior/MWCC version as the directory name 1.1 under tools/mwcc_compiler/.
Continued existing uppercase Makefile tool variables such as CC, LD, AS, OBJCOPY, ELF2DOL, and SHA1SUM.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No direct assembly or function-matching tactic was present in the diff.
Indirect matching tactic: make the exact MWCC version explicit so builds consistently invoke CodeWarrior 1.1 / MWCC Build 158 binaries.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR context.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that change MWCC_VERSION or add additional tools/mwcc_compiler version directories.
Search for build failures or README updates related to tools/mwcc_compiler/1.1 path assumptions.
Look for later infrastructure that supports per-object or per-library compiler versions.
